summary: Tested Session Metadata UI in Create Post Modal with auto-fill surf conditions. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: spot selector dropdown, auto-fill from Open-Meteo API, GPS button, date/time inputs, wave/wind/tide fields all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session metadata UI feature is fully functional. Create Post modal has 'Add Session Conditions' expandable section with spot selector, GPS button, date/time inputs, and wave/wind/tide fields. Auto-fill from Open-Meteo API works when selecting a spot. Session data is correctly saved to posts and displayed in feed via SessionLogHeader component.

features_verified.create_post_modal_session_section: PASS - 'Add Session Conditions' expandable section present with data-testid='toggle-session-data'
features_verified.spot_selector_dropdown: PASS - Shows known spots (Pipeline, Mavericks, Rincon, etc.) from /api/surf-conditions/known-spots
features_verified.auto_fill_on_spot_select: PASS - Selecting Pipeline auto-fills wave_height_ft=4.2, wind_speed_mph=10.2, wind_direction=NE
features_verified.location_auto_fill: PASS - Location field auto-fills with spot name (e.g., 'Pipeline, Oahu')
features_verified.gps_button: PASS - GPS button present with data-testid='fetch-conditions-gps' for location-based conditions
features_verified.session_date_default: PASS - Date input defaults to today (04/04/2026)
features_verified.time_inputs: PASS - Start and End time inputs present and functional
features_verified.wind_direction_dropdown: PASS - Direction dropdown with N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW options
features_verified.tide_dropdown: PASS - Tide dropdown with Rising, High, Falling, Low options
features_verified.auto_fill_indicator: PASS - 'Auto-filled' badge and 'Auto-filled from Open-Meteo' text shown
features_verified.post_creation_with_metadata: PASS - POST /api/posts includes session metadata correctly
features_verified.session_metadata_in_feed: PASS - Created posts show session conditions in feed

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions/known-spots: PASS - Returns 30 known spots with key, name, lat, lon
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions?spot_name=X: PASS - Returns wave_height_ft, wind_speed_mph, wind_direction from Open-Meteo
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/posts (with session metadata): PASS - Creates post with all session fields
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/posts (without session metadat: PASS - Creates post with null session fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts: PASS - Returns posts with session metadata in response

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features, bookings endpoint may not exist)
